description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with an exaggerated, highly stylized form. The figure's limbs and torso are elongated and twisted, creating a surreal, almost abstract silhouette. The head is small and realistic, with facial features visible, while the body is stretched and contorted, giving the impression of dynamic movement or distortion. The arms are raised and extended far above the head, merging into long, ribbon-like shapes. The legs are bent and splayed, with the feet positioned as if in mid-stride. The overall appearance is both human and artistic, blending realistic and fantastical elements.
description: A highly stylized adult pedestrian with elongated, twisted limbs and a small, realistic head, posed in a dynamic, abstract stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, twisted torso, and dramatically extended arms forming a wide V-shape above the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme curvature of the body and the ribbon-like extension of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the narrow torso, and the splayed legs, with arms stretching outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the contorted posture and the unusual, flowing lines of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting bodysuit with abstract, artistic design
attribute_posture: dynamically twisted and elongated, arms raised and extended
